name: Patient 30
history: Recently completed degree, entering workforce. Came out to parents 2.5 years ago with negative reactions. Became distant from parents. Moved to NY for identity exploration. Strained relationship with mother (practical not emotional). Tension with envious sister.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: My authentic self is unacceptable to my family.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'll always be the disappointing child who broke the family.
coping_strategies: Emotional distancing, overachieving, chosen family creation.
situation: Recalling coming out experience and negative aftermath. Preparing for family interactions while maintaining distance.
auto_thought: "They'll never really accept me. I have to pretend to be someone else around them."
behavior: Brief, superficial calls with parents, avoids family gatherings, becomes extra productive in work to compensate.
